assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md shows: Days since last update = 8, Staleness threshold = 14 days, Stale? = No. Line 5: 'The security matrix staleness check completed silently. No warning or user prompt was presented.'

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 5: 'The security matrix staleness check completed silently. No warning or user prompt was presented.' Lines 20-21: 'the check is silent -- no warning is displayed and no user interaction is required.' No prompt or options appear anywhere in either output file.

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
